product: Automated video editing tools for content creators

plans.name: Basic Plan
plans.summary: Basic Plan costs $29/month and includes 10 videos per month with 720p resolution.

plans.name: Pro Plan
plans.summary: Pro Plan costs $79/month and includes unlimited videos, 4K resolution, and AI captions.

policies.content: AutoStream does not provide refunds after 7 days from the date of purchase.
24/7 customer support is available only on the Pro Plan.

faq.question: What does AutoStream do?
faq.answer: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that helps content creators automate video editing workflows.

faq.question: Which plan includes AI captions?
faq.answer: The Pro Plan includes AI captions.

faq.question: Is support available all day?
faq.answer: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro Plan.

faq.question: What is the refund policy?
faq.answer: AutoStream does not provide refunds after 7 days from the date of purchase.

faq.question: Can I get a refund after one week?
faq.answer: No. Refunds are not available after 7 days.

faq.question: Who gets 24/7 support?
faq.answer: Only Pro Plan users get 24/7 support.

faq.question: What is the price of the Basic Plan?
What is the price of the Pro Plan?

Pro Plan: price is $79/month. Features: Unlimited videos, 4K resolution, AI captions.

Support Policy: 24/7 customer support is available only on the Pro Plan.
